name: @abtree/hello-world

steps.instruct: Check the system clock to get the current hour. Classify as: before 12:00 = "morning", 12:00-17:00 = "afternoon", after 17:00 = "evening". Store the classification string at $LOCAL.time_of_day.

Delegate the next stretch of the tree to a subagent. Exit token: DLG__Compose_Greeting__30271666. Failure token: DLG__Compose_Greeting__30271666__FAILED. ORDERING — submit success for THIS step BEFORE spawning the subagent, because the runtime advances the cursor only on submit. Otherwise the subagent's first `abtree next` would return this same instruct. Use model: "haiku". If your harness does not support model selection, ignore this hint. BRIEF: Pick the time-of-day branch matching $LOCAL.time_of_day and compose a single short greeting sentence addressing $GLOBAL.user_name in $GLOBAL.language with a $GLOBAL.tone tone. Write the sentence to $LOCAL.greeting. Procedure: (1) Call `abtree submit <execution> success` for this step now. (2) Spawn a subagent with this brief: drive `abtree next/eval/submit` on this execution. For evaluates, read every referenced $LOCAL/$GLOBAL path from the store before calling `abtree eval`. When you process an instruct named `Return_To_Parent_Compose_Greeting`, follow its text: submit success for that step, then return ONLY the literal token `DLG__Compose_Greeting__30271666` to your parent and do not call `abtree next` again. If `abtree next` ever returns `{status:"done"}` or `{status:"failure"}`, return ONLY the literal token `DLG__Compose_Greeting__30271666__FAILED`. (3) Block on the subagent. (4) Verify the returned reply equals exactly `DLG__Compose_Greeting__30271666`. Any other reply (including `DLG__Compose_Greeting__30271666__FAILED` or extra text) means the scope failed — surface that and stop driving. (5) On successful verification, call `abtree next` to receive the next post-scope action.
Compose a cheerful morning greeting addressing $GLOBAL.user_name in $GLOBAL.language with a $GLOBAL.tone tone. Store at $LOCAL.greeting.
Compose a warm afternoon greeting addressing $GLOBAL.user_name in $GLOBAL.language with a $GLOBAL.tone tone. Store at $LOCAL.greeting.
Compose a relaxed evening greeting addressing $GLOBAL.user_name in $GLOBAL.language with a $GLOBAL.tone tone. Store at $LOCAL.greeting.

Subagent exit point for scope `Compose_Greeting`. Submit success for this step, then return ONLY the literal token `DLG__Compose_Greeting__30271666` to your parent. Do not call `abtree next` again — the parent will resume from here.
Read $LOCAL.greeting via `abtree local read` and print it verbatim to the human. This step runs in the parent agent after the delegated subagent has returned.

description: Greet a user based on time of day. Demonstrates sequence, selector, and action primitives.

global.user_name: retrieve by running the shell command "whoami"
